emerald.name: Emerald
emerald.description: A green crystal board and matching pieces.

obsidian.name: Obsidian
obsidian.description: Black marble, silver and lava accents.

reaction.title: Reaction
reaction.description: Wait for the signal and tap instantly.
reaction.instructions:
Wait for the signal and tap instantly.

Complete each round accurately. Faster correct answers produce a better millisecond result.

emoji.title: Emoji Find
emoji.description: Find the target emoji among distractors.
emoji.instructions:
Find the target emoji among distractors.

Complete each round accurately. Faster correct answers produce a better millisecond result.

numberMemory.title: Number Memory
numberMemory.description: Remember the number and choose it correctly.
numberMemory.instructions:
Remember the number and choose it correctly.

Complete each round accurately. Faster correct answers produce a better millisecond result.

stroop.title: Stroop Test
stroop.description: Answer by the ink color, not the word.
stroop.instructions:
Answer by the ink color, not the word.

Complete each round accurately. Faster correct answers produce a better millisecond result.

ascending.title: Ascending Numbers
ascending.description: Tap numbers from smallest to largest.
ascending.instructions:
1. Tap the numbers in ascending order starting from 1.
2. A wrong number adds a time penalty and ends survival mode.
3. Higher difficulty adds more numbers and cells.

odd.title: Odd One Out
odd.instructions:
1. Find the single different sticker among matching stickers.
2. A wrong choice adds a time penalty.
3. Higher difficulty adds more stickers and subtler differences.

pattern.title: Pattern Memory
pattern.description: Remember highlighted cells and repeat the pattern.
pattern.instructions:
1. Memorize the positions of the highlighted sticker cells.
2. After they disappear, select exactly the same cells.
3. Higher difficulty increases both the grid and the number of remembered cells.

goNoGo.title: Go / No-Go
goNoGo.description: Tap on green; do not tap on red.
goNoGo.instructions:
1. GO stickers: 🚀 🍏 ✅ 🐸 — tap them quickly.
2. NO-GO stickers: 🛑 🍎 ❌ 🦊 — do not tap.
3. Higher difficulty shortens the response window and increases NO-GO signals.

math.title: Mental Math
math.description: Solve arithmetic problems quickly and accurately.
math.instructions:
1. Solve the arithmetic problem mentally.
2. Choose the correct answer from four options.
3. Higher difficulty introduces subtraction, multiplication and division.

sequence.title: Sequence Memory
sequence.description: Remember the sequence and choose the correct continuation.
sequence.instructions:
1. Memorize the displayed sticker sequence.
2. After it disappears, tap the stickers in the exact same order.
3. The sequence grows with difficulty and later rounds.

cards.title: Card Memory
cards.description: Open cards and match all pairs.
cards.instructions:
1. Open two cards at a time and find matching sticker pairs.
2. Non-matching cards close again.
3. Match every pair as quickly as possible; higher difficulty adds more cards.

time.title: Time Estimation
time.description: Estimate the requested interval without a visible timer.
time.instructions:
1. Press Start and count the requested interval internally.
2. Press Stop when you believe the time has elapsed.
3. Your score is the difference from the real interval in milliseconds.

peripheral.title: Peripheral Vision
peripheral.description: Keep focus at the center and detect the outer target.
peripheral.instructions:
1. Keep your eyes fixed on the ✚ at the center.
2. Detect the sticker that flashes briefly at the edge of the screen.
3. After it disappears, choose its direction. Higher difficulty shortens the flash and uses eight directions.

twentyFour.title: 24 Game
twentyFour.description: Choose the expression that makes exactly 24.
twentyFour.instructions:
1. Use each of the four given numbers exactly once.
2. Choose the expression whose result is exactly 24.
3. Check operator precedence and parentheses carefully.

nback.title: Dual N-Back
nback.description: Track visual positions and sounds from N steps earlier.
nback.instructions:
1. Track the grid position and sound sticker on every step.
2. Decide whether they match the signal N steps earlier: position, sound, both or neither.
3. A higher N and difficulty increase the memory load.

puzzle.title: 15 Puzzle
puzzle.description: Slide tiles until numbers are ordered from 1 to 15.
puzzle.instructions:
1. Tap a number next to the empty cell to slide it.
2. Arrange the numbers from 1 to 15 left-to-right and top-to-bottom.
3. Higher difficulty and shuffle count require more moves.

sudoku.title: Sudoku
sudoku.description: Complete a 9×9 number grid using logic.
sudoku.instructions:
Every row, column and 3×3 box must contain the digits 1 through 9 exactly once.

Select a cell and enter a digit. Notes mode lets you record small candidate digits. A mistake adds a 15-second penalty and a hint adds 30 seconds. In a duel, both players receive the exact same uniquely solvable puzzle.

ticTacToe.title: Tic Tac Toe
ticTacToe.description: Take turns placing X and O against a friend.
ticTacToe.instructions: Be the first to place three matching marks in a horizontal, vertical or diagonal line on the 3×3 board.

checkers.title: Checkers
checkers.description: Play 8×8 Russian draughts with a friend.
checkers.instructions: White moves first. Men move forward but capture in every diagonal direction. Captures are mandatory, and a multi-capture must continue with the same piece. A man reaching the last row becomes a flying king. Each turn has a 60-second limit.

duel.sameContent: Both players receive the exact same board, stickers and challenges.
duel.title: Friend match
duel.sameStart: The match starts simultaneously on both devices.
duel.waitingAcceptance: Invitation sent. The match starts immediately when your friend accepts.

sudoku.exitConfirm: The current Sudoku result will not be saved. Leave the game?
sudoku.setupInfo: Choose 1–3 Sudoku boards. Every board has a unique solution, while higher difficulty provides fewer starting clues.
sudoku.penaltyInfo: Penalties added +{{seconds}} seconds to the total time.

v2.checkersHeroText: Prove your skill in Checkers, earn ELO and climb toward the Legend league.
v2.leaderboardDescription: Only rated Checkers matches affect Overall Rating.
v2.levelExplanation: All games award XP. XP increases LEVEL but never changes the Checkers ELO rating.
v2.checkersHubDescription: Compete for ELO in rated play or challenge a friend without affecting rating.
v2.ratedMatchDescription: The system finds an opponent near your strength. ELO rises on wins and falls on losses.

v2.friendRatingSafe: Friendly matches do not change your ELO rating.
